description: Derive ADLB analysis dataset from SDTM LB records for HbA1c primary endpoint.

cases.task_description: Derive the complete ADLB dataset for this subject. Output a JSON array with one record per visit containing: USUBJID, VISIT, PARAM, AVAL, BASE, CHG, PCHG, ABLFL, ANL01FL.
cases.study_context:
SAP INSTRUCTION — ADLB DERIVATION (HbA1c Primary Endpoint):
- PARAM = "Hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) [%]"
- AVAL = analysis value (copy from LBSTRESN)
- BASE = baseline AVAL (AVAL at VISIT=SCREENING for this subject)
- CHG = AVAL - BASE
- PCHG = ((AVAL - BASE) / BASE) * 100, rounded to 2 decimal places
- ABLFL = "Y" if VISIT = "SCREENING", else ""
- ANL01FL = "Y" for post-baseline records (WEEK 12, WEEK 24), else ""
